references.name: The New York Times
observedPatterns: Slim masthead navigation with uppercase sans-serif links
Large serif headlines with generous letter-spacing
Kicker/byline metadata in small-caps above headlines
Thin ornamental rules separating content sections
adaptedElements: Masthead nav with Montserrat uppercase links
Volume/section kickers above each view title

references.name: The Paris Review
observedPatterns: Warm cream background with dark brown text
Pull-quote formatting with large italic serif type
Editorial grid with asymmetric column widths
adaptedElements: Pull-quote card in dashboard with decorative quotation marks
Asymmetric layout in workspace sidebar/editor split

references.name: Monocle
observedPatterns: High-contrast editorial cards with minimal border treatment
Category labels in tiny uppercase sans-serif
Magazine-style grid layouts for content browsing
adaptedElements: Category labels on project and idea cards
Three-column grid for projects and ideas
Minimal card borders with hover elevation
